title: Thai-Style Cherry Flatbread with Crispy Topping
description: Crispy flatbread topped with a sweet and spicy Thai-inspired cherry sauce, served with a crunchy German-inspired topping.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: use gluten-free soy sauce for gluten-free option

instructions: Cut the flatbread into desired shapes and sizes.
In a small bowl, mix together cherry jam, soy sauce, and honey until smooth.
Brush the mixture onto the flatbread, leaving a small border around the edges.
Sprinkle sesame seeds and crispy shallots on top.
Bake in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and the topping is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Cut into smaller pieces and serve immediately.
Optional: top with sliced fresh herbs or a sprinkle of toasted coconut flakes.
